name: Fried Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook asparagus spears in boiling salted water until barely tender. Drain on paper towels.
2. In a wide bowl, beat the egg with milk. Dip the asparagus spears into the egg mixture, then coat with bread crumbs.
3. Heat oil to 364°F (180°C) in a deep fryer or large skillet. The pan should be large enough that its diameter exceeds the length of the asparagus spears.
4. Fry the coated asparagus, a few at a time, until lightly browned, about 2 minutes.
5. Drain on paper towels. Season with salt and pepper. Sprinkle with grated cheese.
